# write_vol { #neuroim.write_vol }

```python
write_vol(vol, filename, format='NIFTI', data_type=None)
```

Write a neuroimaging volume to file.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name      | Type                                     | Description                                                                                             | Default    |
|-----------|------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| vol       | [NeuroVol](`neuroim.neuro_vec.NeuroVol`) | The volume to write                                                                                     | _required_ |
| filename  | [str](`str`) or [Path](`pathlib.Path`)   | Output filename                                                                                         | _required_ |
| format    | [str](`str`)                             | Output format (currently only "NIFTI" supported)                                                        | `'NIFTI'`  |
| data_type | [str](`str`)                             | Output data type (e.g., "FLOAT32", "INT16") Defaults to "FLOAT" for NIfTI, inferred from input for AFNI | `None`     |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::write_vol
